flags.label: Public bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Florida Agricultural and Mechanical University are 23% below the public bachelor's-predominant peer median ($44.3k vs $57.2k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Florida Agricultural and Mechanical University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.7% → 0.0%).
